mapper.select: SELECT si.id, si.supplier_id, si.material_id, si.unit_price, si.order_unit AS order_unit, -- 'EA' 고정값 제거 si.price_unit AS price_unit, si.conv_to_stock AS conv_to_stock, -- conv_to_base → conv_to_stock COALESCE(si.stock_unit, m.unit) AS stock_unit, -- 공급처 단위 우선 m.material_name, m.material_type, m.warehouse_code, si.min_order_qty, si.order_multiple, si.supply_available, si.note FROM supplier_item si JOIN material m ON m.material_id = si.material_id WHERE si.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY m.material_name
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier_item WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId}
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier_item SET unit_price = #{unitPrice}, unit = #{unit}, note = #{note}, supply_available = #{supplyAvailable}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT si.*, m.material_name, m.material_type FROM supplier_item si JOIN material m ON si.material_id = m.material_id WHERE si.id = #{itemId}
